h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Debugging with AI to Solve Stuck Apps
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with basic code. Learn advanced AI debugging strategies using Antigravity and Claude Code to ship complex SaaS features faster than ever.
content.answer_block: Stop fighting syntax errors manually. By integrating Antigravity for architectural analysis and Claude Code for iterative CLI-based debugging, you transform your workflow from reactive fixing to proactive engineering. This stack automates logic verification, ensuring you ship robust, high-performance features that satisfy demanding clients without the usual overhead of manual testing.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a cursor blinking on a screen, the client’s deadline looming like a thunderhead. You’ve built the 'standard' CRUD app a dozen times, but now that you're pushing into complex state management and asynchronous data flows, the bugs are multiplying faster than you can squash them. You aren't just stuck; you're hitting the ceiling of manual debugging, where every fix feels like pulling a thread that unravels the whole sweater.

But the era of the 'lone coder' is over. The secret to scaling your freelance output isn't working more hours—it's offloading the cognitive load of debugging to specialized AI agents. When you combine the structural oversight of Antigravity with the surgical precision of Claude Code, you don't just fix bugs; you re-engineer your entire approach to development, turning complex technical debt into clean, shippable code.

steps.title: Contextualize the Failure
steps.description: Before fixing, you must map the failure surface. Use Antigravity to generate a structural map of your problematic module.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current directory and generate a dependency graph for the failing module. Identify potential circular dependencies or state leakage points.

steps.title: Isolate the Logic Bug
steps.description: Use Claude Code to perform a trace of the execution flow in the CLI to identify exactly where the data transformation breaks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the logic flow in [file_path] and suggest three test cases that would trigger the current race condition.

steps.title: Automated Refactoring
steps.description: Once the bug is localized, instruct the AI to propose a fix that adheres to your existing project architecture.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Rewrite the function [function_name] to handle the identified edge cases without introducing side effects. Maintain the current design pattern.

steps.title: Regression Testing
steps.description: Ensure the fix doesn't break upstream dependencies. Run a full suite verification using the AI's understanding of your project structure.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Check the impact of the recent changes on the API endpoints. Are there any downstream breaking changes?

steps.title: Final Documentation Update
steps.description: Update your technical documentation automatically so you don't have to manually track changes for the client.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Update the README.md and internal architectural docs to reflect the new state management logic applied in the last commit.

pro_tips: Always use the --focus flag in Claude Code to limit the token scope and prevent the AI from hallucinating on unrelated files.
Treat your Antigravity dependency maps as living documentation; export them as JSON to track project complexity growth over time.
When debugging async errors, explicitly ask the AI to provide a 'race condition sequence' to visualize the timing of the failure.
Use Claude Code's shell access to verify environment variables before running tests, as 80% of 'hard' bugs are just missing .env keys.
Maintain a 'prompt library' of your most effective architectural analysis queries for Antigravity to ensure consistency across different client projects.
content.next_steps: Once you have successfully debugged your module, verify the performance metrics using your browser's dev tools and commit your changes to a feature branch. Then, begin integrating your new testing patterns into your CI/CD pipeline to automate this process for future builds.
content.conversion_block: Stop wasting hours on manual bug hunting and start shipping high-value features for your clients faster than your competition. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
